requester.requester_label: Graph Sync extension requested network egress for workspace indexing.

authority_owner.source_label: Managed extension-egress policy owns this decision and forbids local override.

policy_lock.lock_explanation: Organization policy blocks extension network egress for community extensions in this workspace.

target_scope.target_label: Network egress capability for the Graph Sync extension in the current workspace.
target_scope.remembered_scope_consequence: No user-remembered grant is allowed; policy remains the authority until changed by an admin.
target_scope.revocation_route_label: Settings > Policy > Extension egress shows the active lock and admin review path.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Activate an extension capability under workspace context.
capability_groups.purpose_label: The extension wants to enrich workspace graph metadata.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Open network egress from the extension host.
capability_groups.purpose_label: The extension wants to contact its declared indexing service.

prompt_questions.what_is_requested: The extension requested workspace-scoped network egress.
prompt_questions.why_needed: The extension says network access would enrich graph metadata, but the source is policy-blocked.
prompt_questions.changes_if_allowed: Network egress would leave the local workspace boundary from the extension host.
prompt_questions.works_if_denied: Local files, search, editor actions, and read-only extension metadata remain available.
prompt_questions.grant_scope_statement: Policy-managed scope is active; no user grant can widen it.
prompt_questions.authority_owner_statement: The managed policy owner, not the extension or local user, owns this decision.
prompt_questions.revocation_route: Review the lock in Settings > Policy > Extension egress or request admin review.

side_effect_envelope.effect_summary: Would allow an extension-host capability to reach a declared external service.

consequence_blocks.outcome_label: Policy change would be required before egress
consequence_blocks.description: Only an admin policy change can admit this egress capability.
The extension remains restricted to local and metadata-only behavior.
The policy source forbids user override and records a policy-blocked prompt trace.

denial_or_degrade.deny_path_behavior_label: Policy denial keeps local editing and read-only extension metadata available.
denial_or_degrade.recovery_or_escalation_action: Request managed policy review; local user override is forbidden.
